title: 8 Things Colossians 3:23 Demands From the Way You Work
caption:
"Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men." Paul wrote that to men with real jobs, real bosses, real Mondays they didn't want to show up for.

That verse doesn't leave room for the version of you that only tries hard when it's noticed. The task nobody will ever see. The corner you're tempted to cut when no one's looking. The praise you didn't get for work you did anyway.

Christ washed feet. You can finish the job you hate.

Save this for the next Monday that feels pointless.

#faith #work #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #colossians #scripture #christianity
